notes: Culprit renames a metadata field on the metric envelope but the decoder still expects the old name, so deserialization fails on every message -> metric-ingestor-1 stops flushing -> the metric-ingestor-1-iq queue backs up and kafka-metric-ingestor sees rising ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage. Rollback restores the field name. The aws-sdk bump deployed to kafka-metric-ingestor near onset is an innocent decoy.
